observations: head_sha narrows results to workflow runs associated with the specified commit
filtered workflow-run searches return at most 1000 results
Link response headers are the pagination control surface

finding: Pagination continuity alone is insufficient evidence integrity. Retained pages must also agree on total_count, contain only the requested head_sha, contain unique run ids, expose exactly one terminal page, and reconcile retained count when the declared total is within GitHub's 1000-result filtered-search cap.

verification.source_write: GitHub contents API accepted both files

uncertainty: No authenticated live enumeration was performed
The 1000-result filtered-search ceiling prevents global completeness claims above the cap
A structurally coherent retained bundle does not prove authentication scope or deployment behavior
falsification_route: Provide a retained bundle with a foreign head_sha, duplicate run id, page gap, total_count drift, multiple terminal pages, or a retained-count mismatch; the classifier must reject it.
privacy_boundary: No credentials, private chat, health material, or identifying personal data are included.
